title: Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight - 110 Lumens / 10M Distance (Magnet)-77mm X 114mm | High Intensity Cob LEDs | One Button Action | Magnetic Base | Compact & Durable Design
features: Ultra-Bright Illumination with High-Intensity COB LEDs: The Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight is equipped with cutting-edge COB LED technology, delivering a powerful 110 lumens of brightness. This ensures that even the darkest corners of your home or workspace are brilliantly illuminated.

Magnetic Base for Hands-Free Operation: The integrated magnetic base allows you to easily attach the Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight to any metal surface, providing hands-free illumination where you need it most. Whether you're working under the hood of your car, inside a tight space, or just need to keep your hands free

One-Button Operation for Simplicity and Convenience: Featuring a user-friendly one-button action, the Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight offers simple and intuitive operation. With just a single press, you can easily switch the light on or off, making it perfect for quick use in emergencies or when you need to light up a space fast.

Wide Beam Angle with 10m Light Distance: The Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight is designed to cover a wide area, with a beam that extends up to 10 meters in distance. This makes it ideal for both close-up work and broader illumination tasks, providing ample light coverage to meet a variety of needs.

Energy-Efficient & Long-Lasting Performance: Engineered with efficiency in mind, the Dekton Pro Light Xw110 Sunshine Homelight provides long-lasting illumination while conserving energy. Its advanced LED technology ensures that the light remains bright without draining power quickly, making it a reliable choice for extended use.
description: The Dekton Pro Light XW110 Sunshine Homelight is a versatile and powerful lighting solution designed to bring brightness and convenience to any space. With an output of 110 lumens, this compact light ensures optimal illumination for a range of indoor and outdoor activities. The high-intensity COB LEDs deliver a strong and consistent beam, covering up to 10 meters of distance, making it perfect for tasks that require focused lighting. Measuring 77mm x 114mm, the XW110 Sunshine Homelight is designed for portability without compromising on durability. Its compact size allows it to fit easily in tight spaces, while the sturdy construction ensures it withstands regular use. The one-button action makes operation straightforward and user-friendly—simply press the button to activate the light, and you’re ready to go. One of the standout features of this homelight is its magnetic base, which provides hands-free convenience by allowing you to attach it securely to any metal surface. This feature is particularly useful for tasks where you need both hands free, such as working under the hood of a car or setting up camp in low-light conditions. The magnetic base also makes it easy to position the light at the perfect angle, ensuring you get the illumination exactly where you need it. Built to last, the Dekton Pro Light XW110 Sunshine Homelight is constructed from high-quality materials that offer long-lasting performance.
